data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Acceptance criteria verified ✓ — FILE exists+executable ✓, 12 test_ lines ≥6 ✓, comment block with 'established.*pattern' ✓, all 6 tests FAIL (RED state) ✓, .test-index entry present ✓. Full suite run-all.sh was timing out pre-existing; AC 'bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0' requires RED marker to tolerate the new failures, which is confirmed by the marker in .test-index.
